ab: maki qutux qbsuyan muw mlikuy, Kuras lalu nya, mpuw qutux kawas nya.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫Kuras，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is kulas, he is 11 years old.

ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: sami ka qbsuyan muw ga smawya sami balay mqwas.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: smawya sami balay mlngyaq, trang mhngaw ga, sami qutux ngasal msqun myan musa mlngyaq.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: blaq maku smrangi giqas na rangi,aki sami msqun mqwas ru mlngyaq.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
